title: angelica montana var. angustifolia
intro: Angelica montana var. angustifolia, also known as mountain angelica, is a perennial plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of mountain angelica include reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues, among others. Mountain angelica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and it is often used in herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
